name: cos
author: Philip Yazdani
description: Workspace root for the JS-side MCP servers + the shared mcp-kit helper. Scoped to the MCP servers (not the Next.js board, which has a disjoint dep tree and manages its own install) so the single shared dep — @modelcontextprotocol/sdk — hoists to one root node_modules + one lockfile instead of being duplicated once per server.
